title: The Best Home Saunas To Turn Your Home Into a Relaxing Spa
summary: It’s time to put yourself first. Shop the best outdoor, indoor and portable saunas for your home.
body: All products and services featured are independently chosen by editors. However, Billboard may receive a commission on orders placed through its retail links, and the retailer may receive certain auditable data for accounting purposes. You don’t have to leave home to enjoy a perfectly relaxing spa day, just get a home sauna. At-home sweat lodges can come in handy when you need to relax after a long day or an intense workout. If the idea of buying a home sauna feels intimidating or overwhelming, it’s not as daunting as you may believe. In fact, you don’t need a ton of space to fit one comfortably in your home and there are several options on sale throughout the web. What is the best home sauna overall? The Sun Home Saunas Equinox is our best overall pick because of its mix of heating types, premium design, chromotherapy lighting, EMF/ELF blocking technology and range of features for beginners and experienced users alike. We also like its competitive price. See below for more information on possible benefits of home saunas and brands that we recommend.
